chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Appeal No. 497 of 2021 (Mst. Hira @ Muskan vs. the State) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of case 2. For hearing of MA No. 887/2022 23.11.2022 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Metlo advocate for appellant Mr. Faheem Hussain Panhwar, D. P.G -.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant Mst. Hira @ Muskan by way of instant application under Section 426 Cr.P.C has sought for suspension of sentence and her release on bail mainly for the reason that she being lady is having a suckling baby; she has already undergone more than 02 years of the sentence inclusive remission out of total sentence of 07 years and there is no likelihood of her appeal in near future, which is awarded to her for offence punishable under Section 302(c) PPC, by learned trial Court. Learned DPG for the state has recorded no objection to the release of the applicant on bail. In view of above, while relying upon case of Makhdoom Javed Hashmi vs. The State (2007 SCMR 1844), the operation of the sentence awarded to the appellant is suspended, consequently, she is directed to be released on bail subject to her furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. The listed application (M.A.No.887/2022) is disposed of accordingly. Adjourned to 15.12.2022 for haring of main appeal. JUDGE
